subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-24 in London
subcodes.first_line: The property of heat exists in all things, but a power is needed for that heat to be made manifest. In the realm of religion, it is the power of Baha'u'llah that causes the heat of the love of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: حرارت در جمیع اشیا موجود است اما قوه ای لازم که آن را ظاهر کند همچنین در عالم دیانت
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @heat and motion, @John the Baptist
